subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket with the hood up over a warm layer and dark trousers, stepping off the curb to cross the foggy coastal street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears rubber boots damp with fog; the red jacket the one vivid shape emerging from the sea mist, hood raised
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded winter jacket with hood up, warm layer, dark trousers, rubber boots, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Light tan, smooth youthful skin cool in the damp dawn air
subjects.facial_features: Round face partly veiled by mist and the raised hood, small features

subjects.description: A few parked cars along the curbs of the coastal street, half-dissolved in the sea fog
subjects.appearance_details: Weathered coastal sedans in salt-faded muted colors, their outlines softened and dulled by the drifting fog
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A coastal residential street beside a concrete overpass in a North American coastal town at winter dawn, wrapped in sea fog. Weathered shingle houses and a low sea wall line a two-lane road of damp concrete that runs toward the fog-veiled overpass pillars. Bare salt-stunted trees and a few parked cars sit along the curbs; a faint pre-sunrise glow bleeds through the mist. Sidewalks run beside the homes. The damp concrete shows faded center markings under the diffuse cool dawn light.

lighting.conditions: Cool winter dawn thick with sea fog
lighting.direction: Weak, diffuse pre-sunrise glow scattered evenly through the fog
lighting.shadows: No distinct shadows; the sea fog flattens the dim dawn light
lighting.illumination_effect: Cool, diffuse foggy glow with the overpass looming faintly; the child's red jacket is the one strong color cutting through the grey mist

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool grey sea fog, damp pale concrete, faint peach dawn glow, dark salt-stunted trees, and a muted red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Still, cold, foggy coastal dawn calm broken by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Fog-veiled overpass pillars, a few parked cars, low sea wall receding into mist

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the near road and crossing child; the overpass and background dissolve into sea fog

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the fog-wrapped coastal residential street at dawn.
A small child in a red jacket emerges from the sea fog, steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the damp concrete, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the damp concrete, partially faded and softened by the sea fog, still readable up close
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the fog-wrapped coastal street at dawn, the overpass pillars and parked cars faint in the sea fog.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed through fog
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child emerges from the fog and steps into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly on the damp concrete.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears from the fog; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely through the mist.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary in the fog

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a fog-wrapped coastal residential street at winter dawn, the overpass pillars looming faintly ahead past a few parked cars. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead out of the mist. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking on the damp concrete, slowing with a slight forward pitch. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary in the fog while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Muffled coastal-dawn quiet with distant surf and a foghorn, the low hum of the vehicle over damp concrete, then firm tire and brake friction as it decelerates, settling into a soft idle deadened by the sea fog.
